name: consistent-character
description: Create images of a given character in different poses

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in your image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

number_of_images_per_pose.description: The number of images to generate for each pose.
number_of_images_per_pose.title: Number Of Images Per Pose

number_of_outputs.description: The number of images to generate.
number_of_outputs.title: Number Of Outputs

output_quality.description: Quality of the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality.
output_quality.title: Output Quality

prompt.description: Describe the subject. Include clothes and hairstyle for more consistency.
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Set a seed for reproducibility. Random by default.
seed.title: Seed

subject.description: An image of a person. Best images are square close ups of a face, but they do not have to be.
subject.title: Subject
